case_title: WELLS FARGO BANK N.A. VS. JENNIFER M QUIGLEY

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT QUIGLEY, JENNIFER M $18,472.34 PRINCIPAL, $509.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $18,981.34, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 61733838)

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT QUIGLEY, JENNIFER M SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  NOV-08-2017
DECLARATION RE: UNDERLYING ACTION OF ACCOUNT STATED (TRANSACTION ID # 61733838) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK N.A.
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, (TRANSACTION ID # 100046977) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT QUIGLEY, JENNIFER M
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-30-2018 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $509.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 61733838) AS TO DEFENDANT QUIGLEY, JENNIFER M
DECLARATION RE: WAIVER OF ATTORNEY FEES (TRANSACTION ID # 61733838) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK N.A.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAY-22-2018 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY, (TRANSACTION ID # 100038604): BLANDA, JON O SUBSTITUTED FOR WINN, BRIAN N AS ATTORNEY FOR WELLS FARGO BANK N.A.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-30-2018 CONTINUED TO MAY-22-2018 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE JAN-30-2018 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
